---
title: "Workshop"
author: "Shunqi Zhang"
date: "2026-07-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Task 0; Set Working Directory 

```{r iris0, echo= F}

#Set your OWN working directory 
setwd("C:/Users/rmjdszh/OneDrive - University College London/Iris_repo")

```

## Task 1: Read the csv
```{r iris1, echo=FALSE}

#Iris is available in R library 'datasets'
iris <- iris

print(iris)

```

## Task 2: Save the data 

```{r iris2, echo=FALSE}

write.csv(iris, "iris.csv")


```

## Task 3: Filter 

```{r iris3}

# Filter rows where Species is "setosa"

setosa_data <- subset(iris, Species == "setosa")

write.table(
  setosa_data,
  file = "setosa_data.csv",
  sep = ",",
  row.names = FALSE,
  col.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)
```
